prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock turbocharger on the *Smartstream G2.5 T-GDi* (engine code: *G4KM*) with a *Garrett GTX3071R Gen II* (71mm compressor, 56mm turbine) paired with a *PTP Turbo Manifold* (304 stainless steel, equal-length design) to support 350+ WHP on E30 fuel. Upgrade the intercooler to a *Mishimoto Performance Aluminum Intercooler* (2.5" core thickness, 50% larger than OEM) to eliminate heat soak under sustained boost.

Drivetrain: Install a *PRL Motorsports Stage 2 Clutch Kit* (multi-plate ceramic, 600 ft-lb torque capacity) with a *South Bend Performance Dual-Disc Clutch* for the *N86-1* 8-speed wet DCT. Pair with a *OS Giken Super Lock LSD* (2-way, 45/90 ramp angles) to mitigate torque steer under aggressive launches.

Suspension: Swap the OEM struts for *Öhlins Road & Track DFV Coilovers* (30-way adjustable damping, 20mm drop from stock) with *Whiteline Adjustable Front Sway Bar* (24mm, 3-position adjustable) and *SuperPro Polyurethane Bushings* (full kit, 95A durometer) to sharpen turn-in response. Add *H&R Sport Springs* (20mm drop) for pre-load adjustment if coilovers are not desired.
estetica: Aero: Fit a *Rocket Bunny V3 Widebody Kit* (pre-preg carbon fiber, 50mm wider front fenders, 70mm wider rear) with *Seibon Carbon Fiber Hood* (dual vents, 30% weight reduction). Install a *Vorshlag Motorsports Rear Diffuser* (3D-printed ABS, 3-channel design) and *APR Performance GT-250 Adjustable Wing* (30" span, 20mm rise, 3D-printed endplates).

Wheels: Mount *Work Emotion CR Kiwami* (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x10.5 +35 rear) with *Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect* tires (255/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear). Use *Project Kics R40 2-Piece Lug Nuts* (M12x1.5, 60° taper) for secure fitment.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with *Recaro SPG XL* (side-mounted, FIA-approved) and add a *Sparco 6-Point Harness* (ASM-compliant). Install a *Momo Mod.73 Steering Wheel* (350mm diameter, suede grip) with a *NRG Quick Release Hub* (short pattern). Add *Defi BF Series Gauges* (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) in a *P3Cars Vent-Mounted Display*.
